query: average virtual office pricing New Orleans French Quarter monthly annual revenue estimates demand coworking virtual mailbox
answer:
**Executive Summary**

The New Orleans virtual office and coworking market demonstrates strong demand driven primarily by small businesses, though inventory within the French Quarter itself is highly constrained. Monthly virtual office packages in the New Orleans area range from $49 to $100, while general coworking memberships range from $200 to $650 per month. Despite a 15.15% traditional office vacancy rate in 2024, the flexible workspace sector is expanding rapidly, evidenced by major operators like The Shop reaching full capacity and opening new locations in early 2026. 

**Detailed Analysis**

**Virtual Office and Coworking Pricing**
Virtual office pricing in New Orleans is highly competitive, with monthly rates generally falling between $49 and $100 depending on the location and included services. 

*   **French Quarter Specifics:** Virtual office addresses on Dauphine Street in the French Quarter are available for $50 per month through Alliance Virtual Offices [Source: $50/mo Virtual Offices in Louisiana with Mail Forwarding](https://www.alliancevirtualoffices.com/louisiana-virtual-offices), while another provider lists a Dauphine Street virtual office starting at $100 per month [New Orleans Office Space and Virtual Offices at Dauphine Street](https://www.abcn.com/offices-new-orleans-louisiana-dauphine-street-3992).
*   **Central Business District (CBD) & Broader New Orleans:** Davinci Virtual Office Solutions offers CBD virtual spaces starting at $49 per month [CBD New Orleans Virtual Office Space for Rent | CBD Virtual Office](https://www.davincivirtual.com/loc/us/louisiana/new-orleans-virtual-offices/cbd/). Opus Virtual Offices charges $99 per month for a location at 3205 Orleans Avenue [Virtual Office in New Orleans - 3205 Orleans Avenue | $99/Month](https://www.opusvirtualoffices.com/virtual-office/louisiana/new-orleans/location-1381/), and Alliance Virtual Offices offers packages at 1340 Poydras Street starting at $100 per month [Virtual Office at 1340 Poydras Street, New Orleans, LA](https://www.alliancevirtualoffices.com/virtual-office/us/la/new-orleans/1340-poydras-street-4853).
*   **Daily and Hourly Rates:** Regus provides virtual office services starting at $3 per day across 10 city locations [Virtual Offices in New Orleans | Regus](https://www.regus.com/en-us/united-states/louisiana/new-orleans/virtual-offices). For physical space access, Davinci Virtual offers private day offices and conference rooms at 201 St. Charles Avenue starting at $25 per hour [Get a New Orleans Virtual Address at 201 St. Charles Avenue | Davinci Virtual](https://www.davincivirtual.com/loc/us/louisiana/new-orleans-virtual-offices/facility-4222).

General coworking memberships in New Orleans start at $200 per month, with assigned desks at $350 per month and private offices at $650 per month [New Orleans coworking spaces: 10 spaces to work and collaborate - Curbed New Orleans](https://nola.curbed.com/maps/new-orleans-coworking-spaces). 

**Pricing Comparison Table**

| Provider / Location | Service Type | Monthly Rate | Daily / Hourly Rate |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Alliance Virtual Offices** (Dauphine St) | Virtual Office | $50 | N/A |
| **Davinci Virtual** (CBD) | Virtual Office | $49 | N/A |
| **Opus Virtual Offices** (Orleans Ave) | Virtual Office | $99 | N/A |
| **ABCN** (Dauphine St) | Virtual Office | $100 | N/A |
| **The Shop at the CAC** (Camp St) | Coworking | $375 | $40/day; $150/week |
| **urbanHUB \| LGD** (Magazine St) | Dedicated Desk | $475 | $40/day; $100/week |
| **Regus** (Multiple Locations) | Virtual Office | N/A | $3/day |
| **Davinci Virtual** (St. Charles Ave) | Day Office / Meeting | N/A | $25/hour |

**Virtual Mailbox Services**
Virtual mailbox and mail forwarding services are frequently bundled with virtual office packages. Opus Virtual Offices includes mail forwarding and live receptionist services in its $99 monthly fee [Virtual Offices in New Orleans, LA - Opus Virtual Offices](https://www.opusvirtualoffices.com/virtual-office/louisiana/new-orleans/). Standalone virtual mailbox providers like PostScan Mail (located at 201 Saint Charles Ave) charge a base rate plus $5.00 per month for each additional recipient or user [Month-to-month Virtual Mailbox Rental near New Orleans, LA 70170 | PostScan Mail](https://www.postscanmail.com/a/201-saint-charles-ave-ste-114.html). PostScan also charges $2.00 per envelope for "open and scan" services (up to 10 pages), with a $0.25 fee for each additional page [Month-to-month Virtual Mailbox Rental near New Orleans, LA 70170 | PostScan Mail](https://www.postscanmail.com/a/201-saint-charles-ave-ste-114.html).

**Market Demand and Real Estate Dynamics**
The New Orleans market currently supports 134 coworking locations [New Orleans, LA Commercial Real Estate for Lease or Sale](https://www.commercialcafe.com/commercial-real-estate/us/la/new-orleans/). Demand for these spaces is robust, particularly among small businesses, which make up 78% of Regus's local customer base (compared to just 3% enterprise and 3% mid-market) [Best Coworking Spaces in New Orleans, LA](https://www.g2.com/categories/coworking-spaces/locations/new-orleans-la-us). Niche operators are also emerging, such as Mind Body Collective NOLA, which provides specialized virtual offices and patient-visit spaces for telehealth and wellness practitioners [Virtual Offices for Telehealth Practitioners | Mind Body Collective Nola](https://mindbodycollectivenola.com/virtual-offices/).

*   **French Quarter Constraints:** Establishing coworking spaces directly within the French Quarter is challenging due to zoning and real estate composition. Retail dominates the French Quarter, accounting for approximately 88% of the local commercial market, leaving active office listings extremely limited or non-existent [French Quarter, New Orleans, LA Commercial Space Listings](https://www.commercialcafe.com/commercial-real-estate/us/la/new-orleans/french-quarter/). 
*   **Expansion and Capacity:** Due to high demand, The Shop Workspace's original 40,000-square-foot location at the Contemporary Arts Center (CAC) is at full capacity with a waiting list [Locations | Coworking Space New Orleans | The Shop Workspace](https://shopworkspace.com/location/new-orleans/). In response, the company is opening a second location (The Shop SOMA) in South Market by mid-May 2026 [The Shop targets mid-May opening for its second New Orleans location | New Orleans CityBusiness](https://neworleanscitybusiness.com/blog/2026/03/27/shop-workspace-south-market-coworking/).
*   **Traditional Office Context:** The flexible workspace boom contrasts with the traditional office market, which saw an overall vacancy rate of 15.15% in 2024 (and up to 27.07% in the Uptown submarket) [New Orleans Office Price per Sqft and Office Market Trends](https://www.commercialcafe.com/office-market-trends/us/la/new-orleans/). Traditional office rent averaged $18.84 per square foot in 2024 [New Orleans Office Price per Sqft and Office Market Trends](https://www.commercialcafe.com/office-market-trends/us/la/new-orleans/), with current rates averaging $21 per square foot [New Orleans, LA Office Space for Rent](https://www.commercialcafe.com/office/us/la/new-orleans/). Despite vacancies, investor confidence in the CBD/French Quarter border remains strong, highlighted by the March 2026 sale of the One Canal Place office tower to a New York investment group [One Canal Place office tower sold to New York investment group](https://www.fox8live.com/2026/03/31/one-canal-place-office-tower-sold-new-york-investment-group/).

**Gaps and Limitations**
*   **Revenue Estimates:** The provided research findings contain no data regarding monthly or annual revenue estimates for virtual office or coworking operators in New Orleans.
*   **French Quarter Coworking Presence:** There is a contradiction in the findings regarding physical coworking spaces in the French Quarter. One source claims there are absolutely no coworking spaces directly within the neighborhood [Co-Working in the New Orleans French Quarter - New Orleans French Quarter](https://www.frenchquarter.com/co-working-in-the-quarter/), while another indicates Alliance Virtual Offices operates a coworking location on Dauphine Street [Virtual Office New Orleans and Virtual Office Solutions - Dauphine Street](https://www.alliancevirtualoffices.com/virtual-office/us/la/new-orleans/dauphine-street-3992).
*   **Expansion Metrics:** There is a discrepancy regarding the square footage of the upcoming Shop SOMA location, with sources conflicting between 5,400 square feet and 6,500 square feet [The Shop at CAC in New Orleans expanding to South Market | Business News | nola.com](https://www.nola.com/news/business/shop-at-cac-expansion/article_06b163e3-85b9-4c62-84c7-370dfe5f2b7a.html).
